strategy: 5x per day to reach +20k followers in 30 days

daily_slots.goal: Start the day with authority — make people think and share
daily_slots.example: The biggest lie female founders are told about scaling...

daily_slots.content_type: Rapid breakdown of a specific AI tool for founders
daily_slots.goal: Education + reach — drives saves and new followers
daily_slots.example: The AI tool that replaced my entire onboarding system

daily_slots.content_type: Behind-the-scenes of an automated workflow or system
daily_slots.goal: Aspiration — show the backend running while you live your life
daily_slots.example: This automation handled 47 client inquiries while I was at lunch

daily_slots.content_type: Deep resonance post addressing Founder Burnout and relief
daily_slots.goal: Connection and DMs — makes people feel seen and reach out
daily_slots.example: You don't need a new strategy. You need a system that breathes for you.

daily_slots.content_type: Direct lead-gen post with keyword CTA
daily_slots.goal: Convert — drive DMs and consultation bookings
daily_slots.example: If you're making over $250k and still doing this manually, DM me LEGACY.

phase_1.goal: Foundation — optimize profile, test content formats

phase_2.focus: Double down on what worked in Phase 1

phase_4.focus: Amplify top performers, optimize sales funnel
